feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Accessing Success Factors Goals gives a network error ONLY for some users
entry.content:
we are noticing that for some users, they get a network error when they access SF goals.

I found a ticket -3666645 - Time out error while creating goals from Goal Library, with a similar issue. 

However this for us is happening ONLY for some users, not all. 

SAP has this open since 10.10.2025 as Product Engineering is still investigating this issue, has any one else run into this issue. 

Regards

RI

entry.title: Position Management Dynamic Workflow Story Report
entry.content:
Hi - We currently have a dynamic workflow set up for position management approvals. I am trying to create a story report to show who position management workflows are sitting with. I am unable to pull in the current approver into my story report. The report will only show me originator and last approver. How can I include current approver in my story report? 

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: SuccessFactors Performance Form Business Rule Returning -1972 for Unofficial Rating in M2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am configuring a business rule for a Performance Management form (Role Readiness Assessment) and I am facing an issue where the rule always retrieves –1972 for the Unofficial Rating (Employee Rating) value.

As a result, the GAP calculation and my comment‑requirement logic never execute.

🔍Scenario

I have a competency section (Role Specific Competencies) where:

  • Employee enters Unofficial Rating in M1
  • Manager enters Official Rating in M2
  • In M2, if the GAP > 2, I want to make section comments mandatory


🔧My Rule Logic (simplified)

  • Check current step = Manager Review
  • Check Unofficial Rating is not null and not –1972
  • Compare: Official Rating – Unofficial Rating > 2
  • If Yes → Set Section Comment Required = YES

However, the rule always treats the Unofficial Rating as –1972, even when the manager is editing in M2.

The XML shows that the form is in Step M2. If the "Unofficial Rating" (Employee Rating) was hidden or not provided in the previous step (M1), the system will return -1972 when the rule attempts to pull that value for a gap calculation.

 Any recommended patterns to ensure GAP logic works consistently?

Thank you in advance — I appreciate any guidance from the community!

entry.title: I want to create a business rule to trigger alert notification to new joiner after 10 days of his jo
entry.content:
I want to create a business rule to trigger alert notification to new joiner after 10 days of his joining if he has direct reports assigned to him on his DOJ and if direct reports belongs to USA. 

I have tried but it seems impossible, Is there any possibility?

entry.title: manager is unable to see indirect reports in story report
entry.content:
Hi,

We've created a report for the managers to see the leave balances for their direct reports (level 1) and indirect reports (like level 2, 3, 4, etc.). However, the report displays only their direct reports. The target population is setup as per the screenshot attached. Any idea how can we get the indirect reports to display in the report output?  

FYI, Manager is able to view indirect reports in table report and employee profile view.

Thanks for your help in advance!

entry.title: Time Account Type Validity in Successfactors
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I need your suggestion to map the below scenario for a new time type in Successfactors:

For a new time type effective from 01-April, I need to create a time account type. For 1st year, time account should be valid for 9 months i.e. from 01-April to 31-December and from next year onwards Time account type is valid for whole year i.e. from 01-January to 31-December. Accrual is annual for this time account. 

I am not able to see the option to map this scenario in time account type configuration. I also tried business rule as well but account validity date is always 1 year.

Please suggest. 

Thanks in advance. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Audit report for the updates done in Talent Flags in Employee File
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement related to SAP SuccessFactors Succession Planning module.

HR needs to know when manager updated Talent Flags in Employee File i.e. Time Stamp for Talent Flags - risk of loss , impact of loss.

I know in Calibration- audit report can be created, but what i am looking for TimeStamp for Talent Flags in Employee File only.

Please suggest how this requirement can be met.

Thankyou!

entry.title: Compensation Information View in Latest People Profile
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to display the monthly salary instead, based on a specific Pay Component (e.g. Base Salary)?

Ideally, the value should reflect the monthly amount from the relevant Pay Component Recurring rather than the calculated Annualized Salary.

Has anyone implemented this in the Latest People Profile, and if so, what would be the recommended configuration approach?

Best regards

SAP SuccessFactors Compensation

entry.title: Data flow from Custom MDF to talent flags?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can we automate data flow  from Custom MDF to EP standard fields- Talent Flags, example - Risk of Loss , Impact of Loss ? 

please share if this is possible? 

Thankyou

entry.title: Mashup Page
entry.content: Hello, has anyone figured out a way to either hide or change the job title that is pulling into the mashup page for ECP.   See screenshot below.  We want the job title on the employee profile to pull in or remove the field all together.

entry.title: Manager tagging in the system
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I just want to confirm why does the system did not read a user as Manager even if the user is tagged as manager?

Does the system require a manager to have direct reports so it can read them as manager? Is it a standard system behavior?

 

Best Regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Unable to view payslip
entry.content:
Hi,

We are getting the below warning message when a user is trying to view his payslip.

Additionally few users were unable to view their most recent payslip (Feb 2026), they can however view the historical ones.

We have referred to SAP KBA 3586976, but no luck,

Please advise.

Regards,

Prabu

entry.title: Auto-delegate Added as Section in Legacy People profile
entry.content:
Hi All,

We created AutoDelegate as Section in Legacy People profile so all Action Employee has to take can be from his profile. To enable better experience.

Now post New people profile Migration there are user UI which are not supported anymore. Did anyone face this any ETA on the fix.

Not Supported in new people profile.

entry.title: Question About Certification Requirement for Access to EC Provisioning
entry.content:
Hi all,
I would like to ask one question regarding SAP SuccessFactors certifications.
If a person obtains the following certification, would they be eligible to access the EC implementation Provisioning environment?

SAP Certified - SAP SuccessFactors Platform: Reporting (C_THR92)

We are currently considering the priority order of certifications for our internal team members, so I would appreciate it if you could kindly confirm this when you have a chance.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: SuccessFactors - Latest People Profile Page
entry.content:
Hi

We are in the middle of configuring the Latest People Profile Page, and was wondering what affect moving cards into different categories, affects reporting and any integrations we have set up?

For example, we had 'absence' which sat in our 'profile' area now moved to the 'Time Information' category.  Does reporting stil show this as sitting under profile or will it show in 'time' and we need to reconfigure all of our reporting/integrations?  Or is the latest people profile page, just a 'display/cover' and has no effect on existing reports/integrations?

Thanks

entry.title: changes to company org chart and sync with jobinfo
entry.content:
Hello,

Please is there a way to synchronize between updates from company org chart to employee jobinfo. For example Department 1 is no longer associated to Division 1, it's instead associated with division 2. will the employees assigned to Department 1 have their Division automatically updated in their profiles?

entry.title: EC Global Assignment and LMS Users (multiple users) - how are you using this ?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have been using LMS for 8 years, and are about to deploy EC.

The concept of "Employee Central Global Assignment / Concurrent Employment in LMS", i really don't see any added value for having multiple users (Home and Host) in the LMS.

Has anyone built an alternative way of managing this ?

Two reasons why I don't like this:

a) our staff need to complete loads of pre-requisite Compliance courses before doing any work. If they are using a concurrent or host user, then the system would not recognize prior learning completions. We could manually use Merge users, but this is not really convincing. Finally, this means doing merge back once a host acc

b) Learning should be focussed on the Person, not on the contact. 

I just read in a SAP article that SAP may be considering implementing a People-Centric view. That would make so much sense.

If you work with the standard multiple users, are you satisfied with this?

Thanks,

 

Kristian

entry.title: Usernames created as old-username@domain-n (where n is increment from 1)
entry.content:
I know this is standard procedure for SAP SuccessFactors (https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2835790) - but we see that we have several seasonal workers in different employments during the years and som har domain-4 or -5 as username. This gives us the following headaches: 
1. We sync usernames to external non-SAP payroll. This fails, as username in payroll needs to be a valid email address

2. We do also write username from Entra ID / Azure AD to SuccessFactors, and we are well stocked with errors now, as "username already exists". For Entra ID see the user as the same user, but in SuccessFactors the user may be on his 4th employment - where the 1st employment (now inactive) is user@domain.com, 2nd employent (inactive) is user@domain.com-1, 3rd employment (inactive) is user@domain.com-2 and the active is user@domain.com-3  

Is there a good way to automatically switch usernames so the last active can be without the number-increment? Or do anyone have any other good calls for this?

Thank you !

entry.title: Export Manage Permission Roles detail view
entry.content:
I've seen similar questions being raised, and this far it seems to be an ongoing limitation in SuccessFactors. There seems to be no report & no report domain available that will allow admins to extract a report that will give the granular level of detail you find in Manage Permission Roles --> View role for....

Down to field level and the type of access (view, edit etc.)

This is a constant audit requirement and there appears to be nothing available to allow admins to extract this granular level of information. The available domains described in KBA 2089542 (Different types of RBP reports available in Table Report) does not meet this requirement.

The only way available seems to download the permissions from 'Manage Permission Roles --> View role for....', extract to Excel and manipulate the data from there?

entry.title: Data Replication Proxy - Time Off
entry.content:
We have Data Replication Proxy set up to replicate absences. We recently added a new absence but forgot to add it to the Data Replication Configuration list of time types. We have now added it, but need to generate the proxies for the absences that were created before the Data Replication Configuration was updated.

In the Data Replication Configuration, there is a field for Execute Data Replication Proxy job. However, the documentation says that if it is set to Yes, it will create proxies for all relevant absences, even if they have already been created. This does not sound like what we want.

The alternatives suggested in documentation are to use Trigger Data Replication Proxy Creation Job, but I only see an option to do that by user, not by the time type. The other suggested alternative is to make a change to each Time Off/Absence record, which could be rather time consuming. 

Another alternative that I am wondering about is creating a new Data Replication Configuration record with only the new absence type, set the Execute Proxy Creation to Yes, and then delete this new record and let the existing Data Replication Config record pick up any newly created absences going forward.

Does anyone else have a suggestion on how this can be handled? 

Thank you,

Cindy
